description_long: This is a single passenger train carriage with a streamlined rectangular body, painted primarily in black with a bold orange stripe running along the lower side. The carriage features a series of evenly spaced rectangular windows along both sides, allowing for ample natural light inside. The ends of the carriage are solid, with visible connectors and couplers for attachment to other train cars. The undercarriage includes detailed wheel assemblies and suspension components, typical of modern rail vehicles. The exterior surface appears metallic and robust, designed for durability and safety in urban rail environments. There are no visible doors along the sides, suggesting entry may be at the ends or not depicted in this model.
description: A black and orange passenger train carriage with a row of rectangular windows and detailed undercarriage, designed for urban rail transit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid end of the carriage with connectors and a small orange panel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the carriage, a continuous row of rectangular windows, and the orange stripe.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with a solid end and visible connectors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the window and stripe arrangement of the other side.
